lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. It is fully operational and has been well-maintained. The exterior and interior show minor signs of regular use but no major damage.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and body damage. The interior shows heavy wear and tear. The engine and transmission require major mechanical repairs to be functional.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, presenting exactly as it did on the showroom floor. The exterior finish is flawless, with no scratches, swirls, or imperfections of any kind. Inside, the interior is pristine, showing absolutely no signs of wear on the upholstery or controls. It has been meticulously maintained and garage-kept, making it a perfect example for a discerning buyer who expects the highest quality.

Get ready to hit the road in a vehicle that combines reliability with a well-cared-for history! This car is in good condition, showing consistent maintenance and a clean, comfortable interior. It’s a fantastic choice for someone who wants a dependable daily driver that still looks and feels great. A solid, honest car that's ready for its next owner!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic work to be made roadworthy. The engine currently has a heavy oil leak and a persistent knocking sound coming from the lower block, suggesting internal damage. Additionally, the transmission is slipping during gear changes. On the exterior, there is significant rust along the rocker panels and several large dents on the rear passenger side. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn fabric seats and a cracked dashboard. The tires are bald and the brakes require immediate replacement. This car is being sold strictly as-is, suitable as a project car or for parts.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Characterized by robust mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with long-term reliability. We invite you to experience the superior value and uncompromising quality of this exceptional selection.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty car and it's been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, so it's ready for its next adventure with a new owner! It runs great and looks fantastic inside and out. I'm sad to see it go, but I know it'll make someone very happy. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear only. Ready for immediate use.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between reliability and style. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road chips consistent with careful use, while the alloy wheels remain free of major scuffs. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, boasting supple leather seating with minimal bolster wear and a fully functional infotainment suite. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, backed by a consistent service history and a set of tires with plenty of tread remaining. It drives straight and true, offering a comfortable, quiet ride for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been preserved to an exacting standard, ensuring a driving experience that balances performance with long-term reliability. A premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber automobile at a competitive valuation.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents an outstanding acquisition for the discerning motorist seeking both quality and value.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride that’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily commutes and weekend trips. It’s got that perfect balance of being well-loved but still looking and driving great. You’re going to love how smooth it feels on the road—it's totally ready for its next adventure with a new owner!

This E92 M3 is a purist’s specification, featuring the high-revving S65 naturally aspirated V8 engine and a tactile 6-speed manual transmission. The powertrain delivers linear torque and a sharp 8,400 RPM redline, supported by a variable M differential lock for superior corner-exit traction. The chassis retains its factory-tuned rigidity with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) providing versatile damping rates. Well-maintained with documented service history, including critical rod bearing and throttle actuator preventative maintenance, this specimen offers a visceral driving experience and mechanical integrity that justifies its standing as a modern classic performance icon.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Maintenance up to date. Reliable performance. Clean interior.

This meticulously maintained 2018 Lexus RX 350 presents beautifully in Atomic Silver with a refined Parchment leather interior. As a detail-oriented owner, I have ensured this vehicle remains in reliable, high-functioning condition. The exterior retains a deep gloss, showing only minor, expected road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary; the leather is supple and free of tears, all electronics—including the premium navigation system and heated/ventilated seats—function perfectly, and it has never been smoked in. Under the hood, the V6 engine runs smoothly, backed by a comprehensive service history and a recent oil change and brake inspection. It drives exactly as a luxury SUV should—quiet, composed, and confident. This is a turnkey vehicle for someone who values both comfort and a well-documented mechanical pedigree.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and aesthetic integrity. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical reliability and passenger comfort. An ideal selection for the discerning driver seeking a premium pre-owned experience that balances long-term value with immediate road-readiness.

This offering balances sophisticated aesthetics with proven reliability, ensuring a premium driving experience for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of reliability and performance. The exterior shines with a deep luster, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful use. Hey there! I'm selling my awesome car and it's looking for a brand new home! It’s been super reliable for me and is still in great shape for all your upcoming adventures. It drives like a dream and has been well-loved, so you know you're getting a solid ride. If you're looking for something dependable that still looks fantastic on the road, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

Presenting a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six powerplant. This high-revving unit utilizes six individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing to deliver linear power up to an 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis remains composed thanks to a factory-spec limited-slip differential and a recently inspected rear subframe. Mated to a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission, the drivetrain provides visceral tactile engagement. While showing honest signs of use consistent with a well-loved performance vehicle, the mechanical integrity is sound, with critical cooling system refreshes and rod bearing services already addressed. A perfect specimen for the enthusiast seeking an analog driving experience with sorted mechanicals.

With a complete maintenance history and recent preventative care, this car represents a fantastic opportunity for a discerning buyer seeking quality and longevity without the new-car price tag.

This unit maintains a commanding presence, offering a balanced fusion of performance and comfort.
